userStories.title: 为 loot/overflow 增加 text command 与 expect 回归
acceptanceCriteria: text command 场景可断言 loot 入仓与 overflow
headless 回归串起 `battle -> loot -> snapshot` 最小闭环
userStories.lastLearnings: `loot` snapshot data is already exposed to `expect field ...`, `expect warehouse ...`, and status-text assertions, and the text-runtime regression already covers the minimal `battle -> loot -> snapshot` closure.

userStories.title: 建立 profession resource schema 与 registry scan
acceptanceCriteria: `data/configs/professions/` 下的 profession resources 可被扫描与校验
registry failure 会报告缺失 ID、重复 ID 与非法引用
userStories.lastLearnings: Profession static data now lives in CU-13 resource files instead of hardcoded profession seed builders; `ProgressionContentRegistry` remains the top-level bundle owner, while profession scan/validation is isolated enough to report path-specific schema failures cleanly.

userStories.title: 把正式 profession seed 迁出 ProgressionContentRegistry
acceptanceCriteria: 正式 profession seed 由资源提供，不再硬编码在 `ProgressionContentRegistry`
progression regression 在迁移后继续通过
userStories.lastLearnings: The runtime ownership was already correctly split: `ProgressionContentRegistry` only needs to assemble skill/achievement/quest catalogs and pass skill defs into `ProfessionContentRegistry` for profession resource validation/loading.

userStories.title: 建立 skill resource schema、registry scan 与兼容桥
acceptanceCriteria: `data/configs/skills/` 下的 skill resources 可被扫描与校验
在 seed 未全迁完前，registry 仍有最小兼容桥接
userStories.lastLearnings: The stable ownership split is `SkillContentRegistry` for resource scan/schema checks and `ProgressionContentRegistry` for the combined resource+code compatibility view; migrated skills can be identified by `resource_path`, while unmigrated skills still come from code seeds. `.ralph/prd.json` was already dirty in the worktree and was left untouched.

userStories.title: 迁移 warrior 与 archer 正式技能 seed
acceptanceCriteria: warrior / archer 正式技能不再依赖 spec 文件作为唯一真相源
battle 与 progression regressions 在迁移后继续通过
userStories.lastLearnings: Warrior/archer formal skill ownership now sits cleanly in `SkillContentRegistry` resources; the remaining code-seed bridge is effectively `charge` plus mage, and a few legacy placeholder skills needed schema-valid effect payloads once they were promoted into formal `.tres` resources.

userStories.title: 迁移 mage 技能 seed 并固定 cast_variant 兼容回归
acceptanceCriteria: mage 正式技能迁到 resources 后，cast_variant 仍可被稳定加载
相关 regression 覆盖 root-level cast_variant 的兼容语义
userStories.lastLearnings: The legacy mage root-level cast_variant spec used target_mode as a footprint alias, so migration needed canonical ground cast-variants. Mage resources also include intentional zero-effect placeholder skills/variants that the old code catalog already allowed, so resource validation had to preserve that compatibility.

userStories.title: 建立 enemy resource schema 与 registry scan
acceptanceCriteria: enemy template、brain、roster 可通过资源目录扫描和校验
registry 能报告缺失模板、缺失 brain 与非法 roster 引用

userStories.title: 把 enemy template、brain 与 roster seed 迁出 EnemyContentRegistry
acceptanceCriteria: 正式敌方 seed 由资源提供，不再硬编码在 `enemy_content_registry.gd`
wild encounter 与 battle AI regression 在迁移后继续通过

userStories.title: 建立统一资源 validation runner 并覆盖 missing/duplicate/invalid
acceptanceCriteria: profession、skill、enemy、item、recipe、quest 至少覆盖 missing id、duplicate id、invalid reference 三类错误
validation runner 输出可直接用于回归与排障

userStories.title: 把 validation 输出接到 headless regression 面
acceptanceCriteria: 资源校验失败可在 headless/test output 中稳定暴露
validation regression 不依赖人工读取随机日志定位
